item.title: Strong Momentum Meets Stretched Valuations as Knowledge Marine & Engineering Works Ltd Reaches All-Time High
item.description: Knowledge Marine & Engineering Works Ltd has reached a significant milestone by touching its all-time high price of ₹1,969.55 on 4 May 2026, reflecting a remarkable journey of sustained growth and strong financial fundamentals within the miscellaneous sector. Time: 6 minutes ago

item.title: Nivaka Fashions Ltd Slides to All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: After a relentless decline spanning several months, Nivaka Fashions Ltd finally touched its all-time low of Rs 1.15 on 04 May 2026, marking a significant milestone in its downward trajectory. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Blue Jet Healthcare Ltd Surges 7.29% to Day's High of Rs 476 — Outperforms Sector by 5.88 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.98% on 4 May 2026, yet Blue Jet Healthcare Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.29% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 476. This 5.88 percentage-point outperformance over its Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Global Health Ltd Surges 5.34% to Day's High of Rs 1182 — Outperforms Hospital Sector by 1.57 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.99% on 4 May 2026, yet Global Health Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 5.34% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 1182. This 1.57 percentage-point outperformance over the Hospital & Healthcare Services sector’s 3.77% rise highlights a stock-specific strength rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Spandana Sphoorty Financial Ltd Surges 7.32% to Day's High of Rs 244 — Outperforms Sector by 5.16 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.98% on 4 May 2026, yet Spandana Sphoorty Financial Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 7.32% gain, reaching an intraday peak of Rs 244. This 5.16 percentage-point outperformance over its Finance sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific momentum rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Knowledge Marine & Engineering Works Ltd Surges 7.17% to Day's High of Rs 1880 — Outperforms Sector by 3.93 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced by 0.98% on 4 May 2026, yet Knowledge Marine & Engineering Works Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 7.17% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 1880. This 3.93 percentage-point outperformance over its sector underscores a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Thyrocare Technologies Ltd Surges 7.99% to Day's High of Rs 431.95 — Outperforms Sector by 4.66 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.98% on 4 May 2026, yet Thyrocare Technologies Ltd outpaced both the benchmark and its sector with a robust 7.99% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 431.95. This 4.66-percentage-point outperformance over the Hospital & Healthcare Services sector’s 3.77% rise signals a distinctly stock-specific momentum shift rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Quess Corp Ltd Surges 7.37% to Day's High of Rs 216.3 — Outperforms Sector by 4.91 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.93% on 4 May 2026, yet Quess Corp Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 7.37% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 216.3. This 4.91-percentage-point outperformance over its sector’s 2.46% rise signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Esab India Ltd Surges 7.07% to Day's High of Rs 6809.65 — Outperforms Sector by 6.35 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.93% on 4 May 2026, but Esab India Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.07% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 6809.65. This 6.35 percentage-point outperformance over its sector signals a distinctly stock-specific momentum rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: HFCL Ltd Surges 7.25% to Day's High of Rs 128.4 — Outperforms Sector by 7.79 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex rose 0.92% on 04 May 2026, yet HFCL Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.25% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 128.4. This 7.79 percentage-point outperformance over its Telecom - Equipment & Accessories sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: DLF Ltd. Rallies 3.35% and Approaches 100 DMA Resistance — A Key Technical Test Ahead
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.92% on 4 May 2026, yet DLF Ltd. outpaced the broader market with a 3.35% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 606.8. This 0.82 percentage-point outperformance over its Realty sector peers, which rose 2.63%, signals a stock-specific strength rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Aether Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1274.2
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Aether Industries Ltd reached a fresh 52-week high of Rs 1274.2 on 4 May 2026, propelled by a confluence of robust technical indicators and sustained price momentum that has captivated market attention. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Kirloskar Pneumatic Company Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1573.2
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 1573.2 on 4 May 2026, Kirloskar Pneumatic Company Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, extending its impressive 39.65% rally over the past year. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum and a market environment where the Sensex itself is advancing, albeit with some caution on moving averages. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Indo Tech Transformers Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 2847
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Indo Tech Transformers Ltd reached a fresh 52-week high of Rs 2847 on 4 May 2026, propelled by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained price momentum over recent sessions. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Nestle India Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1472.6
item.description: With a decisive break above Rs 1472.6 on 4 May 2026, Nestle India Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, extending its impressive 25.66% return over the past year. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum and sustained market interest, even as the broader FMCG sector outperformed with a 2.49% gain today. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Advance Petrochemicals Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 230.7
item.description: With a 40.35% gain over the past year, Advance Petrochemicals Ltd has surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 230.7 on 4 May 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined by 3.63% over the same period. This milestone reflects a sustained price momentum supported by a confluence of technical indicators signalling strength across multiple timeframes. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: GNG Electronics Ltd Surges 8.22% to Day's High of Rs 461.25 — Outperforms Sector by 6.31 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex rose 0.82% on 4 May 2026, yet GNG Electronics Ltd outpaced the broader market with an 8.22% gain, touching a fresh 52-week and all-time high of Rs 461.25. This 6.31 percentage-point outperformance over the IT - Hardware sector's 2.56% advance signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 27 minutes ago

item.title: Aether Industries Ltd Surges 7.9% to Day's High of Rs 1259.15 — Outperforms Sector by 6.16 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.82% on 4 May 2026, yet Aether Industries Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 7.9% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 1259.15. This 6.16 percentage-point outperformance over its Specialty Chemicals sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific momentum rather than a mere market lift. Time: 27 minutes ago

item.title: Lodha Developers Ltd Surges 3.13% to Day's High of Rs 929 — Outperforms Realty Sector by 0.75 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.82% on 4 May 2026, yet Lodha Developers Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 3.13% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 929. This 2.31-percentage-point outperformance over the Sensex and 0.75-percentage-point lead over the Realty sector signals a stock-specific strength rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 27 minutes ago

item.title: Gujarat Fluorochemicals Ltd Surges 5.35% to Day's High of Rs 3783.35 — Outperforms Sector by 3.26 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.82% on 4 May 2026, yet Gujarat Fluorochemicals Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 5.35% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 3783.35. This 3.26 percentage-point outperformance over its Specialty Chemicals sector peers highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 27 minutes ago
